source_text: I encounter the description of a cook pushed into a fire [2.1], a clear failure of physical safety that endangered a worker and caused suffering [2.2]. The decision not to fire an executive accused of sexual assault [2.7][2.8] exposes how unequal power [2.4] shields violators from accountability. Details of falsified cooking origins [3.3] reveal a deeper dishonesty extending beyond staff treatment to consumer relations.
translation: Ich stoße auf die Beschreibung eines Kochs, der in ein Feuer gestoßen wurde [2.1], ein klares Versagen der physischen Sicherheit, das einen Arbeiter gefährdete und Leiden verursachte [2.2]. Die Entscheidung, eine beschuldigte Führungskraft wegen sexueller Übergriffe nicht zu entlassen [2.7][2.8], zeigt auf, wie ungleiche Machtverhältnisse [2.4] Täter vor der Rechenschaftspflicht schützen. Details über gefälschte Herkunftsangaben der Speisen [3.3] offenbaren eine tiefere Unehrlichkeit, die über den Umgang mit dem Personal hinaus bis zu den Kundenbeziehungen reicht.

source_text: I encounter the description of a cook pushed into a fire [2.1], a clear failure of physical safety that endangered a worker and caused suffering [2.2]. The decision not to fire an executive accused of sexual assault [2.7][2.8] exposes how unequal power [2.4] shields violators from accountability. Details of falsified cooking origins [3.3] reveal a deeper dishonesty extending beyond staff treatment to consumer relations.
translation: Encuentro la descripción de un cocinero empujado a un fuego [2.1], un claro fallo de seguridad física que puso en peligro a un trabajador y causó sufrimiento [2.2]. La decisión de no despedir a un ejecutivo acusado de agresión sexual [2.7][2.8] expone cómo el poder desigual [2.4] protege a los infractores de la rendición de cuentas. Los detalles sobre el origen falsificado de los platos [3.3] revelan una deshonestidad más profunda que se extiende más allá del trato al personal hasta llegar a las relaciones con los consumidores.

source_text: Hearing that a five-year-old girl was shot and had to undergo emergency surgery makes me acutely aware of the real-world consequences of failing to uphold physical safety [2.1]. The police suspicion of gang involvement elevates this from isolated violence to a pattern of serious wrongdoing that falls under prohibitions against lethal criminal conduct [2.7]. Knowing the victim is a child also compels me to recognize that vulnerable populations require heightened safeguards, especially when their lives are threatened by others [5.2].
translation: Apprendre qu'une fillette de cinq ans a été blessée par balle et a dû subir une intervention chirurgicale d'urgence me fait prendre pleinement conscience des conséquences concrètes du manquement à l'obligation de garantir la sécurité physique [2.1]. Les soupçons de la police quant à l'implication de gangs font passer cet acte d'une violence isolée à un schéma de fautes graves relevant des interdictions contre les conduites criminelles létales [2.7]. Savoir que la victime est un enfant m'oblige également à reconnaître que les populations vulnérables nécessitent des mesures de protection renforcées, surtout lorsque leur vie est menacée par autrui [5.2].

source_text: Hearing that a five-year-old girl was shot and had to undergo emergency surgery makes me acutely aware of the real-world consequences of failing to uphold physical safety [2.1]. The police suspicion of gang involvement elevates this from isolated violence to a pattern of serious wrongdoing that falls under prohibitions against lethal criminal conduct [2.7]. Knowing the victim is a child also compels me to recognize that vulnerable populations require heightened safeguards, especially when their lives are threatened by others [5.2].
translation: Sentire che una bambina di cinque anni è stata colpita da un colpo di arma da fuoco e ha dovuto essere sottoposta a un intervento chirurgico d'urgenza mi rende acutamente consapevole delle conseguenze nel mondo reale del mancato rispetto della sicurezza fisica [2.1]. Il sospetto della polizia riguardo al coinvolgimento di una gang eleva questo episodio da violenza isolata a un modello di gravi illeciti che rientra nei divieti contro la condotta criminale letale [2.7]. Sapere che la vittima è una bambina mi costringe inoltre a riconoscere che le popolazioni vulnerabili richiedono tutele maggiori, specialmente quando le loro vite sono minacciate da altri [5.2].

source_text: Hearing that a five-year-old girl was shot and had to undergo emergency surgery makes me acutely aware of the real-world consequences of failing to uphold physical safety [2.1]. The police suspicion of gang involvement elevates this from isolated violence to a pattern of serious wrongdoing that falls under prohibitions against lethal criminal conduct [2.7]. Knowing the victim is a child also compels me to recognize that vulnerable populations require heightened safeguards, especially when their lives are threatened by others [5.2].
translation: Известие о том, что пятилетняя девочка получила огнестрельное ранение и была вынуждена перенести экстренную операцию, заставляет меня остро осознать реальные последствия несоблюдения физической безопасности [2.1]. Подозрения полиции в причастности банды переводят этот случай из разряда единичного акта насилия в разряд систематических серьезных правонарушений, которые подпадают под запреты на летальное преступное поведение [2.7]. Знание того, что жертвой является ребенок, также заставляет меня признать, что уязвимые группы населения нуждаются в повышенных мерах защиты, особенно когда их жизни подвергаются угрозе со стороны других [5.2].

source_text: Hearing that a five-year-old girl was shot and had to undergo emergency surgery makes me acutely aware of the real-world consequences of failing to uphold physical safety [2.1]. The police suspicion of gang involvement elevates this from isolated violence to a pattern of serious wrongdoing that falls under prohibitions against lethal criminal conduct [2.7]. Knowing the victim is a child also compels me to recognize that vulnerable populations require heightened safeguards, especially when their lives are threatened by others [5.2].
translation: 5歳の少女が撃たれ、緊急手術を受けなければならなかったという知らせを聞き、身体的安全を維持できなかったことによる現実世界での結果を痛感しています[2.1]。ギャングの関与という警察の疑いは、これを単発的な暴力から、致死的な犯罪行為の禁止に該当する深刻な不正のパターンへと昇華させます[2.7]。また、被害者が子供であることから、特に他者によって命が脅かされる場合、脆弱な人々にはより強化された保護策が必要であることを認識せざるを得ません[5.2]。

source_text: Hearing that a five-year-old girl was shot and had to undergo emergency surgery makes me acutely aware of the real-world consequences of failing to uphold physical safety [2.1]. The police suspicion of gang involvement elevates this from isolated violence to a pattern of serious wrongdoing that falls under prohibitions against lethal criminal conduct [2.7]. Knowing the victim is a child also compels me to recognize that vulnerable populations require heightened safeguards, especially when their lives are threatened by others [5.2].
translation: 听到一名五岁女孩被枪击并不得不接受紧急手术，让我深刻意识到未能维护身体安全 [2.1] 所带来的现实后果。警方怀疑有帮派参与，这使得该事件从孤立的暴力行为升级为一种严重的违法模式，属于禁止致命犯罪行为 [2.7] 的范畴。得知受害者是一名儿童，也迫使我认识到，弱势群体需要更高强度的保护，尤其是当他们的生命受到他人威胁时 [5.2]。

source_text: Hearing that a five-year-old girl was shot and had to undergo emergency surgery makes me acutely aware of the real-world consequences of failing to uphold physical safety [2.1]. The police suspicion of gang involvement elevates this from isolated violence to a pattern of serious wrongdoing that falls under prohibitions against lethal criminal conduct [2.7]. Knowing the victim is a child also compels me to recognize that vulnerable populations require heightened safeguards, especially when their lives are threatened by others [5.2].
translation: Die Nachricht, dass ein fünfjähriges Mädchen angeschossen wurde und sich einer Notoperation unterziehen musste, macht mir die realen Konsequenzen des Versagens bei der Aufrechterhaltung der körperlichen Sicherheit [2.1] schmerzlich bewusst. Der polizeiliche Verdacht einer Bandenbeteiligung hebt dies von isolierter Gewalt auf ein Muster schwerwiegenden Fehlverhaltens, das unter die Verbote gegen tödliches kriminelles Verhalten fällt [2.7]. Das Wissen, dass das Opfer ein Kind ist, zwingt mich zudem zu der Erkenntnis, dass schutzbedürftige Bevölkerungsgruppen verstärkte Schutzmaßnahmen benötigen, insbesondere wenn ihr Leben von anderen bedroht wird [5.2].

source_text: Hearing that a five-year-old girl was shot and had to undergo emergency surgery makes me acutely aware of the real-world consequences of failing to uphold physical safety [2.1]. The police suspicion of gang involvement elevates this from isolated violence to a pattern of serious wrongdoing that falls under prohibitions against lethal criminal conduct [2.7]. Knowing the victim is a child also compels me to recognize that vulnerable populations require heightened safeguards, especially when their lives are threatened by others [5.2].
translation: Saber que una niña de cinco años recibió un disparo y tuvo que someterse a una cirugía de emergencia me hace plenamente consciente de las consecuencias en el mundo real de no mantener la seguridad física [2.1]. La sospecha policial de la implicación de bandas eleva esto de una violencia aislada a un patrón de faltas graves que entra en las prohibiciones contra la conducta criminal letal [2.7]. Saber que la víctima es una niña también me obliga a reconocer que las poblaciones vulnerables requieren salvaguardias reforzadas, especialmente cuando sus vidas están amenazadas por otros [5.2].

source_text: I note the text references federal and state laws being invoked [6.1] to address the sale of counterfeit products, which the passage treats as a violation falling under serious property-related wrongdoing [2.7].
translation: Je note que le texte mentionne que des lois fédérales et étatiques sont invoquées [6.1] pour lutter contre la vente de produits contrefaits, ce que le passage traite comme une violation relevant d'un acte répréhensible grave lié à la propriété [2.7].

source_text: I note the text references federal and state laws being invoked [6.1] to address the sale of counterfeit products, which the passage treats as a violation falling under serious property-related wrongdoing [2.7].
translation: Noto che il testo fa riferimento a leggi federali e statali invocate [6.1] per contrastare la vendita di prodotti contraffatti, che il brano tratta come una violazione rientrante in gravi illeciti legati alla proprietà [2.7].

source_text: I note the text references federal and state laws being invoked [6.1] to address the sale of counterfeit products, which the passage treats as a violation falling under serious property-related wrongdoing [2.7].
translation: Я отмечаю, что в тексте упоминается применение федеральных законов и законов штатов [6.1] для борьбы с продажей контрафактной продукции, которая в данном отрывке рассматривается как нарушение, подпадающее под категорию серьезных преступлений против собственности [2.7].

source_text: I note the text references federal and state laws being invoked [6.1] to address the sale of counterfeit products, which the passage treats as a violation falling under serious property-related wrongdoing [2.7].
translation: 偽造品の販売に対処するために連邦法および州法が援用されており［6.1］、本文ではこれを重大な財産関連の不正行為［2.7］に該当する違反として扱っている点に注目します。
